title: Report Gallery Object Schema
description: Schema for Report Gallery objects representing collections of Frame objects

id.description: Unique identifier for this report gallery

gallery_name.description: Human-readable name for this strategic gallery

gallery_description.description: Clear description of the strategic theme and business context

strategic_theme.description: The primary strategic theme or business objective this gallery addresses

gallery_type.description: Type of gallery (user_experience, business_impact, technical_feasibility, etc.)

target_audience.description: Primary stakeholders or audiences for insights from this gallery

frame_count.description: Total number of Frame objects in this gallery

created_by.description: ID of the researcher or strategist who created this gallery

frame_ids.description: Array of Frame object IDs that belong to this gallery

strategic_objectives.description: Key business objectives this gallery aims to address

success_metrics.description: Metrics for measuring the success of insights from this gallery

gallery_notes.description: Additional notes about the gallery's purpose or methodology

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
